title: Phoenix Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Phoenix with a Z-Score of +4.34. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Phoenix has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is low at 11%, and the wind speed is moderate at 9.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
